nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard d'Aquillon was born in 1049, in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Richard d'Aquillon. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard d'Aquillon est née en 1049, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Richard d'Aquillon. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard d'Aquillon wurde 1049 in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Richard d'Aquillon mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard d'Aquillon è nata il nel 1049 nel Bramber, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Richard d'Aquillon. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリススセックスブランバー
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard d'Aquillonは1049年にイギリスイギリススセックスブランバーで生まれた。彼女はRichard d'Aquillonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard d'Aquillon(은)는 1049년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브램버에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard d'Aquillon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard d'Aquillon родилась в 1049 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Richard d'Aquillon. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard d'Aquillon nació en 1049, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Richard d'Aquillon. Murió en su pueblo.
